main: Hi, I’m ${name}, an Engineering Leader based in Munich - platform ownership, distributed systems, teams at scale.
main.tagline: Leading Teams. Modernizing Platforms. Enabling Engineering Excellence.
about.title: About me
about.paragraph1: I’m Flavius Cojocariu, an Engineering Leader based in Munich, Germany. I lead two platform teams at IU Group — Germany’s largest university — owning the technical direction for student-facing platforms serving over 100,000 users. My work spans platform architecture, team building, and engineering strategy.
about.paragraph2: With 13+ years in software engineering and 5+ years in engineering leadership, I’ve built teams from scratch, driven monolith-to-microservices migrations, introduced observability and DORA-aligned practices, and designed data architectures across organizational boundaries. I operate at the intersection of hands-on technical depth and organizational leadership.
about.paragraph3: I work alongside Heads of Engineering and Directors on cross-company data strategy, and I’ve been selected for task forces that shape how data flows across pre-sales, sales, and post-sales. My peer group is HoEs and Directors — I contribute to quarterly alignment on cross-platform strategy, team structure, and organizational planning.
about.paragraph4: Beyond my full-time role, I help growing tech companies modernize their platform architecture and scale their engineering teams. If you’re a Mittelstand company or scale-up navigating a platform transition, a team scaling challenge, or an architecture decision — I can help.
about.paragraph5: I’m always open to conversations about engineering leadership, platform architecture, or potential collaborations.
services.title: Services
services.frontend.title: Platform Engineering
services.frontend.description: Designing and delivering scalable platform architectures for growing organizations.
services.frontend.content: Platform Modernization: Migrating legacy systems to modern, maintainable architectures.
Microservices & Monorepo Strategy: Structuring codebases for team autonomy and delivery speed.
Developer Experience: CI/CD, observability, and tooling that makes teams faster.
Core Stack: TypeScript, NestJS, Vue.js, Kafka, Docker, AWS.
services.backend.title: Engineering Leadership
service.backend.description: Building and scaling high-performing engineering teams aligned with business goals.
services.backend.content: Team Building: Hiring, onboarding, and developing engineers from junior to senior.
Org Design: Structuring teams for ownership, velocity, and cross-functional collaboration.
Process & Delivery: OKRs, DORA metrics, sprint design, and delivery accountability.
Change Management: Leading teams through re-orgs, migrations, and cultural shifts.
Stakeholder Alignment: Bridging engineering, product, and business leadership.
services.consultancy.title: Consulting
services.consultancy.description: Hands-on advisory for companies navigating platform transitions and engineering growth.
services.consultancy.content: Platform Architecture Review: Assessing and redesigning system architectures for scale.
Engineering Team Assessment: Evaluating team structure, processes, and delivery health.
Distributed Systems Design: Event-driven architecture, data flow design, and API strategy.
Mittelstand & Scale-up Focus: Practical, no-nonsense guidance for companies that build real products.
projects.title: Portfolio Highlights
projects.description: In my portfolio highlights, you’ll find a curated selection of key projects that showcase my ability to develop dynamic, user-centered web applications. Each project demonstrates my commitment to excellence, combining creativity with advanced technologies. For an in-depth look at my work and experience, explore the full details on my resume.

projects.list.title: Senior Engineering Manager (Platform Ownership) | IU Group, Munich, Germany (Jan 2024 - Present)
projects.list.body: Led two engineering teams with full dual ownership of MyCampus Classic (Moodle) and MyCampus 2.0, serving 100,000+ students at Germany's largest university. Delivered the first zero-downtime, zero-incident major intake in 8+ years (October 2025). Consolidated 15+ repos into a NestJS monorepo, cutting maintenance by ~45%. Zero attrition through 3 reorgs. Selected for the cross-company data unification task force alongside HoEs and Directors.

projects.list.title: Senior Software Engineer | remberg GmbH, Munich, Germany (Jan 2022 - Dec 2023)
projects.list.body: Played a key role in architectural decision-making and led code refactoring efforts, transitioning backend features to NestJS for improved code quality. Served as lead developer on two major projects, including migrating email functionality from Mailgun to AWS SES and enhancing file management with a new folder structure. Actively participated in hiring and onboarding, conducting technical interviews and guiding new team members in software architecture.

projects.list.title: Software Engineer - Lead Backend Engineer | ThinxNet GmbH, Munich, Germany (June 2019 - Dec 2021)
projects.list.body: Led backend development, advancing the API-Gateway and transitioning monolithic features to microservices. Built and managed a backend team of 5, actively hiring, onboarding, and mentoring team members. Collaborated with Product Owners and the Head of Software to meet sprint goals, implemented MVPs, and guided the team through technical challenges.

projects.list.title: Earlier Career | Various Companies, Munich & Romania (2012 - 2019)
projects.list.body: Fullstack and backend development across booking platforms, agency work, and product companies in Munich and Romania. Covered PHP, JavaScript, Vue.js, Laravel, MySQL, AWS. Foundation for the platform engineering work that followed.
